title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at KPMG India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at KPMG India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
